title: MustCraft
description: All Minecraft Must Have Mod To Increase Performance And Productivity Without Disrupting The Vanilla Feel.
body:
# MUSTCRAFT

## About Mod
 MustCraft greatly have a fps advantage on minecraft it is a modpack that boost fps and give many functionality.All Minecraft Must Have Mod To Increase Performance And Productivity Without Disrupting The Vanilla Feel.
##  List Of Mods:

<details>
 <summary>Expand</summary>
  
- [Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)  
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)  
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)  
- [Better Stats](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)  
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)  
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)-**Conflicting With Flashback in some areas**.  
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)  
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)  
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)  
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)  
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen)

- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)

- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)  
- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)  
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)  
- [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis)

- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)

### About Us:
We are harcore fan of minecraft and we are very dissappointed by minecraft default optimization so we decided to make a modpack that improves the fps and also add multiple great functionality.
